crime.value: Kidnapping and murder - woman abducted from her apartment and left to die in abandoned waterfront building
crime.quote: She never saw the shadow in her bedroom that moved only after she was fast asleep.

victim.value: Julia Rein, tax assessor with no known enemies, taken by random predator who watched her habits
victim.quote: taken her because her could. Taken her for his own vile purpose.

closed_world.value: Abandoned waterfront building near disused harbor where victim was imprisoned
closed_world.quote: sheer accident several weeks later that a fire had swept the dock down at the disused harbour

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown man who died in traffic accident day after abduction; motive appears to be random predatory behavior
culprit_and_motive.quote: matching one man in a fatal traffic accident to their view of who the abductor was

resolution.value: Fire reveals victim's body, dental records confirm identity, police theorize culprit died in accident
resolution.quote: they called the police who identified her by her dental records

red_herring.value: Initial focus on Julia's tax assessor job creating enemies when the real perpetrator was a stranger who watched her habits
red_herring.quote: Her job as a tax assessor might bring a few mingers down on her head from time to time, but that was all part of the job

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence available to reader: silk nightgown gift from sister, dental records, location near water with specific smells
clue_fairness.quote: part of the silk nightgown which her sister had given her as a birthday gift a week before her abduction

social_world.value: Working professional environment - tax assessor with workplace connections, sister as family contact, company manager tracking attendance
social_world.quote: her Company manager rang her to see why her sister had not been to work in all that time

alibi.value: Perpetrator's accidental alibi - died in traffic accident the day after abduction, establishing timeline through victim's work attendance
alibi.quote: That unforeseen accident happened the day after the abduction occurred, based on the fact that the woman was at work

reveal_mechanic.value: Dental records identification combined with physical evidence matching and timeline reconstruction through traffic accident records
reveal_mechanic.quote: they called the police who identified her by her dental records and part of the silk nightgown

investigator_wound.value: Police officers' emotional response to divine justice - hardened professionals affected by the coincidental death of perpetrator
investigator_wound.quote: Many hardened officers on the case felt their hearts quicken at this revelation

_meta.title: ebook evelyn j steward trial of terror
